_note: Extraction schema for Munich Handbook of Necromancy (CLM 849). Every entity MUST have chunk/passage provenance.
prompt: Extract spirits and experiments from the Munich Handbook text. Output ONLY a JSON object matching this schema. Include raw_quote from the source text. Flag any ambiguities. Do NOT invent entities not present in the text.

name.description: Spirit or entity name as it appears in the text

rank.description: Hierarchical rank (e.g. King, Duke, President, Count, Marquis)

function.description: Primary function or power granted by the spirit

appearance.description: Physical description of the spirit's manifestation

conjuration_method.description: Required conjuration ritual or invocation technique

raw_quote.description: Direct Latin/English quote from source text

ambiguity_note.description: Note any unclear names, damaged text, or editorial uncertainty

predicate.description: Relationship type (e.g. commands, serves, conjures, requires)

parse_error.description: Set to an error message if extraction failed, null on success
